title: NoBadGrief
description: Turns off mob griefing, but keep the good ones
body:
# No Bad Grief

This plugin disables:
- Blocks broken by:
  - Zombie (Breaking doors)
  - Enderman (Picking up grass, dirt, etc.)
- Explosions from:
  - Wither
  - Creeper
  - Ghast Fireballs
- Stepping on Farmlands

Warning
---

I recommend turning off the `FireTick` gamerule, **this plugin doesn't stop explosions from starting fire**
